My family drove to the following places on 2001 labour day weekend
New York City, Washing D.C (White House and then to Virginia Pentagon ) and returned through PA. We missed the 911 by a few days.

My brother was going to his office on Wall Street and saw the first plane crashed into the North Tower. He thought it was Hollywood making a movie. He didn't see the second plane crashed into South Tower because he was inside his office's elevator.

My brother-in-Law was working across the street from the Towers. He didn't see the first plane hit the North Tower but his manager saw it and told him and others about the "accident". he saw the second plane hit the South Tower and people were "sucked out" of the "disappeared " windows. Many jumped to their death before the Towers collapsed.

Two of my classmate worked in the South Tower. One of them were killed. The other one told me there was a fire alarm on the South Tower after the North Tower was attacked.( He was not aware about the attacked on North Tower until later) He and the other classmate went to the ground floor because they thought it was a fire alarm drill. When they arrived the ground floor, some people had already begun to return to their office. The other classmate for some reason followed many others and returned to her office
My classmate followed the fire drill procedure and went outside the South Tower. Within a minute, he found out from others that a plane had crashed into North Tower and people were scrambling to get out of North Tower. He was outside for about 5 minutes when the second plane hit the South Tower.

My brother-in-walk walked 7 hours to get home and he didn't speak for a week.

My brother walk 8 hours to get home and sicked to 2 weeks.

My wife's client was returning from Boston to Hong Kong on Sep 11. They were sending their only son to Boston to attend high school.
They were three flights from Boston to L.A. Two were direct flights and one have to via a stop at Chicago. They were trying to get on the two direct flights to LA. they were on the waiting list and eventually only one spot left on one of the direct flight to LA. Unless they upgrade one of them to business class or they have to travel on a separate flight. My wife's client decided not to s[end the extra money and took the plane that has to make a stop at Chicago.

Her sister ( also my wife's client) in Canada and their parents in Hong Kong gone crazy when they heard about the two plane from Boston hit the two Towers. Her sister in Canada was told the flight number from Boston to LA. the night before. (they were bumped from that flight because they were using air miles) but the sister in Canada didn't know they were bumped from that flight.

Her sister in Canada immediately called her parents in Hong Kong that their daughter told her she and her husband will be on the flight that just crashed into a Building in NY.

For about 2 to 3 hours, her sister in Canada and her parents thought both were killed in the crash. Then her sister in Canada received a phone call from her sister who supposed took the plane that hit the Tower. Apparently, USA became 'No fly zone" and all flight must land but were not allowed to land in USA. So their plane were re-directed to a small town in southern Ontario. Her sister was told by the flight captain that there was an emergency and they must land immediately. However, the captain didn't tell them the plane had to land in Canada until after the plane had landed safely. .

呢個講法因為當時乜都冇曬，冇曬證據去support，所以先“未有定論”。但lab做嘅data，同simulation 都證明呢個講法簡單可行。
